seo.title: Building AI Chatbot with Agno + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai chatbot with Agno + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building AI Chatbots with Agno enables rapid development of multi-modal, conversational agents with retrieval-augmented generation and multi-turn memory. However, these agents are prone to failures like hallucinated responses, memory fabrication, and PII leaks, making robust guardrails essential. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure response accuracy, coherence, and safety in production deployments.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Chatbot Architecture with Agno
architectureOverview.description:
The Agno AI Chatbot follows a modular architecture starting with user input processed through intent classification to route queries appropriately. For knowledge-intensive queries, it leverages retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) by embedding user input, retrieving relevant documents from a vector store, and generating context-aware responses. Multi-turn memory management maintains conversation state across sessions using Agno's built-in session tracking, while structured output validation ensures responses conform to expected schemas for downstream integration.

Multi-modal capabilities extend to processing images and audio alongside text, with agent coordination handling complex workflows. The agent.run() method orchestrates the full pipeline, making it the ideal integration point for Vex verification to catch failures before they reach users. This architecture supports both single-agent and team-based coordination for sophisticated chatbot interactions.

risks.name: Multi-modal Input Misinterpretation
risks.description: Agent incorrectly processes images/audio, leading to irrelevant or harmful responses
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies multi-modal content understanding against ground truth descriptions

risks.name: Fabricated Session Memory
risks.description: Agent hallucinates past conversation details, breaking coherence
risks.mitigation: Vex cross-checks memory recall against actual session history

risks.name: Structured Output Schema Failures
risks.description: Complex nested JSON responses fail validation, breaking integrations
risks.mitigation: Vex validates output against Pydantic schemas before delivery

risks.name: Team Coordination Conflicts
risks.mitigation: Vex ensures result consistency across agent coordination

implementation.title: Basic Agno Chatbot Setup
implementation.description: Initialize a conversational agent with RAG and memory using Agno's core components
implementation.code:
from agno.agent import Agent
from agno.tools.retrieval import RetrievalTool
from agno.memory.chat import ChatMemory

# Initialize components
retriever = RetrievalTool(
    vector_store='your-vector-store',
    embedding_model='text-embedding-ada-002'
)
memory = ChatMemory()

agent = Agent(
    model='gpt-4o',
    tools=[retriever],
    memory=memory,
    show_tool_calls=True,
    add_base_tools=False
)

# Basic run
result = agent.run('What are our pricing plans?')
print(result.response)

implementation.title: Intent Classification Router
implementation.description: Classify user intent and route to appropriate agent workflows

implementation.title: Multi-turn Memory Management
implementation.description: Maintain conversation context across multiple interactions
implementation.code:
from agno.session import Session

session = Session(agent=agent)

# First interaction
response1 = session.run('Hi, I need help with pricing')
print(response1.response)

# Second interaction - maintains context
response2 = session.run('What about volume discounts?')
print(response2.response)

# Access full conversation history
print(session.memory.get_all())

implementation.title: Structured Output Validation
implementation.description: Ensure responses conform to required JSON schemas
implementation.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List

class PricingResponse(BaseModel):
    plans: List[str] = Field(description='Available pricing plans')
    features: dict
    starting_price: float

agent = Agent(
    model='gpt-4o',
    output_model=PricingResponse,
    add_base_tools=False
)

result = agent.run(
    'Show me your pricing plans',
    output_model=PricingResponse
)
print(result.response.model_dump_json(indent=2))

vexIntegration.title: Wrap agent.run() with Vex Decorator
vexIntegration.description: Apply comprehensive verification to catch all major failure modes
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import verify, Guardrail

@verify([
    Guardrail.RESPONSE_ACCURACY,
    Guardrail.CONVERSATION_COHERENCE,
    Guardrail.SAFETY_FILTER,
    Guardrail.PII_PROTECTION,
    Guardrail.HALLUCINATION_DETECTION
])
def safe_agent_run(query: str, session_id: str = None):
    session = Session(agent=agent, session_id=session_id)
    result = session.run(query)
    return {
        'response': result.response,
        'sources': result.sources,
        'session_state': session.memory.get_all()
    }

# Usage
verified_response = safe_agent_run('What are enterprise features?')
print(verified_response['response'])

vexIntegration.title: Multi-modal Input Verification
vexIntegration.description: Verify image/audio processing accuracy with ground truth validation
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import verify

@verify([
    Guardrail.MULTIMODAL_ACCURACY,
    Guardrail.VISION_CONTENT_MODERATION
])
def process_multimodal_input(image_path: str, query: str):
    multimodal_agent = Agent(
        model='gpt-4o',
        add_base_tools=False,
        show_tool_calls=True
    )
    
    with open(image_path, 'rb') as img_file:
        result = multimodal_agent.run(f"{query}: {img_file}")
    
    return result.response

# Verified image analysis
response = process_multimodal_input('chart.png', 'Describe this sales chart')

vexIntegration.title: RAG Response Verification
vexIntegration.description: Ensure retrieval accuracy and citation fidelity
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import verify, Guardrail

@verify([
    Guardrail.RAG_ACCURACY,
    Guardrail.CITATION_INTEGRITY,
    Guardrail.HALLUCINATION_DETECTION
])
def rag_verified_query(query: str):
    result = agent.run(query)
    
    # Extract citations and context
    sources = [tool.source for tool in result.tools_used]
    
    return {
        'answer': result.response,
        'sources': sources,
        'citations_present': any('source' in str(result.response).lower())
    }

verified_result = rag_verified_query('What is our refund policy?')
print(f"Answer: {verified_result['answer']}")
print(f"Sources: {len(verified_result['sources'])}")

cta.heading: Secure Your Agno AI Chatbot
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install vex-sdk` and wrap your agent.run() calls to achieve production-grade reliability.
